testcase.name: testDepositWrongCurrency
testcase.system-out:
12:36:38.598 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.thebank.account.BankAccountApplicationTests]: BankAccountApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 12:36:38.656 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.thebank.account.BankAccountApplication for test class com.thebank.account.BankAccountApplicationTests
. ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
:: Spring Boot :: (v3.3.8)
2026-06-19T12:36:38.881+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] c.t.account.BankAccountApplicationTests : Starting BankAccountApplicationTests using Java 17.0.16 with PID 25216 (started by ozgur in C:\Projects\SwedBank\bank-app\backend) 2026-06-19T12:36:38.882+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] c.t.account.BankAccountApplicationTests : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-06-19T12:36:39.203+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Bootstrapping Spring Data JPA repositories in DEFAULT mode. 2026-06-19T12:36:39.234+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 26 ms. Found 2 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-06-19T12:36:39.476+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-06-19T12:36:39.514+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.5.3.Final 2026-06-19T12:36:39.546+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-06-19T12:36:39.785+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-06-19T12:36:39.805+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-06-19T12:36:39.914+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:bankdb user=SA 2026-06-19T12:36:39.915+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-06-19T12:36:39.931+03:00 WARN 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-19T12:36:40.359+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table accounts (id uuid not null, balance numeric(19,4) not null, card_number varchar(255) not null, currency enum ('EUR','GBP','SEK','USD','VND') not null, name varchar(255) not null, owner varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table transactions (id uuid not null, account_id uuid not null, amount numeric(19,4) not null, balance_after numeric(19,4) not null, currency enum ('EUR','GBP','SEK','USD','VND') not null, description varchar(255) not null, timestamp timestamp(6) not null, type enum ('DEBIT','DEPOSIT','EXCHANGE_IN','EXCHANGE_OUT') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists accounts drop constraint if exists UK6p8wnyww1i4s0oygiw1erctlh Hibernate: alter table if exists accounts add constraint UK6p8wnyww1i4s0oygiw1erctlh unique (card_number) 2026-06-19T12:36:40.390+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-19T12:36:40.781+03:00 WARN 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-06-19T12:36:40.969+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] o.s.b.a.h2.H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration : H2 console available at '/h2-console'. Database available at 'jdbc:h2:mem:bankdb' 2026-06-19T12:36:40.998+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] c.t.account.BankAccountApplicationTests : Started BankAccountApplicationTests in 2.255 seconds (process running for 2.746) Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=?

testcase.name: testExchangeSuccess
testcase.system-out:
Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=? Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.account_id,t1_0.amount,t1_0.balance_after,t1_0.currency,t1_0.description,t1_0.timestamp,t1_0.type from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.id=? 2026-06-19T12:36:41.331+03:00 INFO 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] c.t.a.service.ExternalLoggerService : Simulating external logging for debit. Account: 17dcc147-a5b3-49dc-8492-02d75aa8dd3b, Amount: 50.00 EUR 2026-06-19T12:36:48.248+03:00 ERROR 25216 --- [BankAccount] [ main] c.t.a.service.ExternalLoggerService : Failed to call external logging system: HTTP connect timed out

testcase.name: testCreateAccount
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=?

testcase.name: testExchangeSameCurrency
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=? Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=?

testcase.name: testDebitInsufficientFunds
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=? testcase.name: testDeposit

testcase.name: testDebitSuccess
testcase.system-out:
Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.card_number,a1_0.currency,a1_0.name,a1_0.owner from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.id=?
